name: Meeting Summarizer
description: Meeting transcript processing using Claude API. Provides summarization, structured item extraction (action items, decisions, topics, concerns, wins), sentiment analysis, and 1:1 meeting preparation generation. All functions fail gracefully, returning None or empty collections on error.

types.name: MeetingItemKind
types.description: Enumeration of meeting item types extracted from transcripts

types.name: MeetingItemExtract
types.description: Validated structure for a single extracted meeting item with content validation

functions.name: _truncate
functions.description: Truncates text to MAX_INPUT_CHARS (100,000), attempting to break at sentence boundary if possible. Appends ' [TRUNCATED]' marker if truncation occurs.
postconditions: Attempts to break at sentence boundary ('. ') if found after 50000 chars

functions.name: _parse_json
functions.description: Parses JSON text, stripping markdown code fences (```json...```) if present. Uses regex to detect and remove fence markers before parsing.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: JSON text to parse, possibly wrapped in markdown fences

error_cases.name: invalid_json
error_cases.condition: text is not valid JSON after fence stripping

functions.name: get_client
functions.description: Creates an Anthropic API client using API key from environment variable specified in config. Returns None if API key is missing or client creation fails.

error_cases.name: api_key_missing
error_cases.condition: Environment variable not set or empty

error_cases.name: client_creation_failed
error_cases.condition: Exception during Anthropic() instantiation

postconditions: Returns Anthropic client if API key is available and valid
Returns None if API key is missing, empty, or client creation fails
side_effects: Logs warning if API key is missing
Logs error if client creation fails

structured_side_effects.description: Logs warnings and errors for missing keys or failures

functions.name: summarize_transcript
functions.description: Summarizes a meeting transcript using Claude API. Returns 2-4 sentence summary capturing key points, decisions, and action items. Returns None on any failure (empty input, no client, API error).

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Ascend configuration for model and API settings

error_cases.name: empty_input
error_cases.condition: raw_text is empty or whitespace-only

error_cases.name: client_unavailable
error_cases.condition: client is None and get_client returns None

error_cases.name: api_error
error_cases.condition: Any exception during API call

preconditions: raw_text must be non-empty after strip()
Valid Anthropic client available (provided or creatable)
postconditions: Returns None if input is empty/whitespace
Returns None if API call fails

structured_side_effects.description: Makes API call to Claude with truncated transcript

functions.name: extract_items
functions.description: Extracts structured meeting items (action items, decisions, topics, concerns, wins) from transcript using Claude API. Returns validated list of dictionaries. Returns empty list on any failure.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Ascend configuration for model and API settings

error_cases.name: empty_input
error_cases.condition: raw_text is empty or whitespace-only

error_cases.name: client_unavailable
error_cases.condition: client is None and get_client returns None

error_cases.name: json_parse_error
error_cases.condition: API response is not valid JSON

error_cases.name: invalid_response_type
error_cases.condition: Parsed JSON is not a list

error_cases.name: validation_error
error_cases.condition: Individual item fails MeetingItemExtract validation

error_cases.name: api_error
error_cases.condition: Any exception during API call

preconditions: raw_text must be non-empty after strip()
postconditions: Returns list of validated MeetingItemExtract.model_dump() dictionaries
Returns [] if API response is malformed or unparseable
Invalid items are dropped with warning
side_effects: Logs operation result with item count
Logs warnings for malformed JSON or invalid items

structured_side_effects.description: Makes API call to Claude for item extraction
Logs operation results, warnings, and errors

functions.name: analyze_sentiment
functions.description: Analyzes sentiment of meeting transcript using Claude API. Returns float score in [0.0, 1.0] where 0.0 is very negative and 1.0 is very positive. Clamps out-of-range scores. Returns None on failure.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Ascend configuration for model and API settings

error_cases.name: empty_input
error_cases.condition: raw_text is empty or whitespace-only

error_cases.name: client_unavailable
error_cases.condition: client is None and get_client returns None

error_cases.name: unparseable_score
error_cases.condition: API response cannot be parsed as JSON or float

error_cases.name: api_error
error_cases.condition: Any exception during API call

preconditions: raw_text must be non-empty after strip()
postconditions: Returns None if input is empty/whitespace
Returns None if score cannot be parsed
side_effects: Logs warning if score is out of range (before clamping)

structured_side_effects.description: Makes API call to Claude for sentiment analysis
Logs operation results, warnings, and errors

functions.name: generate_prep
functions.description: Generates a 1:1 meeting preparation plan using Claude API. Synthesizes recent meetings, open action items, and optional performance data into a structured conversation prep. Returns None on failure.

inputs.name: member_name
inputs.description: Name of team member for 1:1 meeting

inputs.name: recent_meetings
inputs.description: List of recent meeting dictionaries with 'date', 'summary', 'items' keys

inputs.name: open_items
inputs.description: List of open action item dictionaries with 'content', 'date' keys

error_cases.name: empty_member_name
error_cases.condition: member_name is empty or whitespace-only

error_cases.name: config_unavailable
error_cases.condition: config is None and load_config() fails

error_cases.name: client_unavailable
error_cases.condition: client is None and get_client returns None

error_cases.name: api_error
error_cases.condition: Any exception during API call

preconditions: member_name must be non-empty after strip()
Valid Anthropic client available (provided or creatable)
postconditions: Returns structured prep plan string on success
Returns None if member_name is empty/whitespace
Returns None if config cannot be loaded
side_effects: Dynamically imports ascend.config.load_config if config is None

structured_side_effects.description: Makes API call to Claude for prep plan generation

functions.name: content_must_be_nonempty
functions.description: Pydantic field validator for MeetingItemExtract.content. Ensures content field is non-empty string.

error_cases.name: empty_content
error_cases.condition: v is empty string or falsy

invariants: All public functions return None or empty collections on error (no exceptions propagate)
All API calls use truncated input via _truncate()
All API calls log operations via ascend.audit.log_operation
Sentiment scores are always clamped to [0.0, 1.0] range
MeetingItemExtract.content is always non-empty (enforced by validator)

data_access.rationale: Reads API keys from environment variables via os.environ.get. No persistent data writes.

side_effects.rationale: All transcript processing functions make HTTP calls to Claude API
Extensive logging for errors, warnings, and operation tracking
Reads Anthropic API key from environment variable specified in config
